name: taejae-design-system
description: Build UI, pages, components, or mockups in the TAEJAE (태재대학교 AI미래전략대학원 / TAEJAE AI Graduate School) brand design system. Enforces the brand rules — white-dominant canvas, TJ Purple (#522C81) as accent only, TJ Mint (#00A497) for interaction, right-angle (sharp) geometry, the 3-level token system, Pretendard Variable — and outputs Next.js + Tailwind v4 code or a self-contained HTML/CSS mockup.
